settings.title: El Encuentro
settings.description: Take the Guardian Test or browse the shop. Browse, look, feel. Something stops you on one — maybe it's its gaze, its name, its essence. That pause is no coincidence.

settings.title: Your Story
settings.description: When you adopt, you share your current situation and your intentions. That information is the foundation for the personalized channeling — it's not a generic form.

settings.title: La Channeling
settings.description: Thibisay reads your story and connects with your Guardian. She receives specific messages for you and writes a personal letter — not a generic text.

settings.title: The Preparation
settings.description: Your Guardian is prepared with a smudging ritual, crystals, and the intention to protect every step of the journey. It's packaged with protective materials.

settings.title: El Viaje
settings.description: International tracked shipping (5–10 business days) and DAC within Uruguay (5–7 days). You receive tracking to follow every step.

settings.title: El Verdadero Encuentro
settings.description: You open the package, read your channeled letter, and perform the activation ritual to seal the connection. Many say this is the moment when everything changes.

settings.title: Channeled letter
settings.description: Personal message written exclusively for you after the channeling.

settings.title: Activation Ritual
settings.description: Step-by-step guide to seal the energetic connection.

settings.title: Portal Mi Magia
settings.description: Lifetime access to the digital portal with guides and exclusive content.

settings.title: Certificado
settings.description: Certificado de originalidad y autenticidad firmado.

settings.title: Packaging protector
settings.description: Packaging designed for your Guardian to travel safely.

settings.title: How It Works
settings.subtitle: From the first encounter to the real energetic connection. Six steps that change everything.
